import requests


def fetch_stripe_payment(event_id: str) -> dict:
    resp = requests.get(f"https://api.stripe.com/v1/events/{event_id}")
    data = resp.json()
    return {
        "id": data["data"]["object"]["id"],
        "amount": data["data"]["object"]["amount"],
        "currency": data["data"]["object"]["currency"],
        "status": data["data"]["object"]["status"],
    }


def process_webhook(payload: dict):
    event_type = payload["type"]
    amount = payload["data"]["object"]["amount"]
    customer_id = payload["data"]["object"]["customer"]
    save_transaction(event_type, amount, customer_id)


def save_transaction(event_type: str, amount: int, customer_id: str):
    db.execute(
        "INSERT INTO transactions (event_type, amount, customer_id) VALUES (%s, %s, %s)",
        (event_type, amount, customer_id),
    )
